BASELIB-CUSTOM_TEMPORARY_POWER_MODEL.des: Temporarily apply a power to a creature.
BASELIB-CUSTOM_TEMPORARY_POWER_MODEL.sma: Temporarily apply a power to a creature.
Gain [blue]{Amount:abs()}[/blue] [gold]{TemporaryPowerTitle}[/gold] until the end of your {UntilEndOfOtherSideTurn:cond:|enemies }turn.{Repeat:cond:>0?\nLasts for [blue]{Repeat:diff()}[/blue] additional {Repeat:plural:turn|turns}.|}
BASELIB-CUSTOM_TEMPORARY_POWER_MODEL.DOW: Lose [blue]{Amount:abs()}[/blue] [gold]{TemporaryPowerTitle}[/gold] until the end of your {UntilEndOfOtherSideTurn:cond:|enemies }turn.{Repeat:cond:>0?\nLasts for [blue]{Repeat:diff()}[/blue] additional {Repeat:plural:turn|turns}.|}
BASELIB-TEMP_HP_POWER.title: Temporary HP
BASELIB-TEMP_HP_POWER.description: Absorbs damage before HP is lost, even damage that ignores [gold]Block[/gold]. Disappears at the end of combat.
BASELIB-TEMP_HP_POWER.smartDescription: Absorbs damage before HP is lost, even damage that ignores [gold]Block[/gold]. Disappears at the end of combat.
